channel.title: Qwen on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Qwen on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Open Weight Models Renaissance: Llama, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek
item.description: Open-weight models are no longer the cheap alternative - in 2026 they are credible defaults for many workloads. A walk through where Llama, Mistral, Qwen, and DeepSeek actually sit relative to closed frontier models, and what changed in the last 18 months.

item.title: Which Mac Studio Should You Buy for Running LLMs Locally?
item.description: A practical guide to Mac Studio configs for running popular free models locally (Qwen, LLaMA, Mixtral), realistic performance expectations, and which hardware actually makes sense.
